Package com.longport.fundamental

Class CompanyOverview

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.longport.fundamental.CompanyOverview
  • public class CompanyOverview
extends Object
    Overview information for a listed company.

    • Field Summary

      Fields 
      Modifier and Type Field Description
      String accountingFirm
      Accounting firm.
      String address
      Registered address.
      String adsRatio
      ADS ratio (may be empty).
      String auditInst
      Auditing institution.
      String busLicense
      Business licence number.
      String category
      Company classification category.
      String chairman
      Chairman name.
      String companyName
      Full legal name.
      String email
      Investor relations email.
      String employees
      Number of employees.
      String fax
      Fax number.
      String founded
      Founding date.
      String icon
      URL to the company's logo icon.
      BigDecimal issuePrice
      IPO issue price.
      String legalCounsel
      Legal counsel.
      String legalRepr
      Legal representative.
      String listingDate
      Listing date.
      String manager
      CEO / Managing Director.
      String market
      Primary listing market display name.
      String name
      Short name, e.g.
      String officeAddress
      Principal office address.
      String phone
      Phone number.
      String profile
      Business profile / description.
      String region
      Market region code, e.g.
      String secretary
      Company secretary name.
      int sector
      Industry sector code.
      String securitiesRep
      Securities representative.
      String sharesOffered
      Number of shares offered at IPO.
      String ticker
      Exchange ticker code, e.g.
      String website
      Company website.
      String yearEnd
      Fiscal year end, e.g.
      String zipCode
      Postal code.
